2605.12374.title: Fill the GAP: A Granular Alignment Paradigm for Visual Reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models
2605.12374.paper_summary: Visual latent reasoning lets a multimodal large language model (MLLM) create intermediate visual evidence as continuous tokens, avoiding external tools or image generators. However, existing methods usually follow an output-as-input latent paradigm and yield unstable gains. We identify evidence for a feature-space mismatch that can contribute to this instability: dominant visual-latent models build on pre-norm MLLMs and reuse decoder hidden states as predicted latent inputs, even though these states occupy a substantially different norm regime from the input embeddings the model was trained to consume~\citep{xie2025mhc,li2026siamesenorm,team2026attention}. This mismatch can make direct latent feedback unreliable. Motivated by this diagnosis, we propose \textbf{GAP}, a \textbf{G}ranular \textbf{A}lignment \textbf{P}aradigm for visual latent modeling. GAP aligns visual latent reasoning at three levels: feature-level alignment maps decoder outputs into input-compatible visual latents through a lightweight PCA-aligned latent head; context-level alignment grounds latent targets with inspectable auxiliary visual supervision; and capacity-guided alignment assigns latent supervision selectively to examples where the base MLLM struggles. On Qwen2.5-VL 7B, the resulting model achieves the best mean aggregate perception and reasoning performance among our supervised variants. Inference-time intervention probing further suggests that generated latents provide task-relevant visual signal beyond merely adding token slots.
2605.12374.paper_summary_zh: 視覺潛在推理使多模態大型語言模型（MLLM）能夠創建作為連續標記的中間視覺證據，避免使用外部工具或圖像生成器。然後，現有的方法通常遵循輸出作為輸入的潛在範式，並產生不穩定的增益。我們識別出一個可能導致這種不穩定性的特徵空間不匹配的證據：主導的視覺潛在模型基於預規範的MLLM，並重用解碼器隱藏狀態作為預測的潛在輸入，儘管這些狀態佔據的規範範疇與模型訓練時所消耗的輸入嵌入有著顯著不同的規範體系~\citep{xie2025mhc,li2026siamesenorm,team2026attention}。這種不匹配可能使得直接的潛在反饋不可靠。基於這一診斷，我們提出了\textbf{GAP}，一種用於視覺潛在建模的\textbf{G}ranular \textbf{A}lignment \textbf{P}aradigm。GAP在三個層面上對齊視覺潛在推理：特徵層級對齊將解碼器輸出映射到與輸入兼容的視覺潛在，通過輕量級的PCA對齊潛在頭；上下文層級對齊將潛在目標與可檢查的輔助視覺監督進行對接；而容量引導的對齊則選擇性地將潛在監督分配給基礎MLLM表現不佳的示例。在Qwen2.5-VL 7B上，所得到的模型在我們的監督變體中實現了最佳的平均綜合感知和推理性能。推理時的干預探測進一步表明，生成的潛在提供了超出僅僅添加標記槽的任務相關視覺信號。
2605.12374.author: Yanting Miao et.al.
2605.12374.authors: Yanting Miao, Yutao Sun, Dexin Wang, Mengyu Zhou, Pascal Poupart, Lei Lv, Qi Zhao, Li Wang, Hao Li, Xiaoxi Jiang, Guanjun Jiang
